auth_notes: Requires a Stripe Secret Key (sk_...) found in the Developers section of the Stripe Dashboard. Different keys are used for Test and Live modes.
rate_limits: 100 read requests per second and 100 write requests per second in live mode; 25 requests per second in test mode.
gotchas: Currency amounts must be provided in the smallest unit (e.g., 1000 for $10.00), which often requires a math step in n8n.
Webhook signatures must be verified using a specific 'Webhook Signing Secret' distinct from the API key.
The n8n node may behave differently depending on the Stripe API version set in the Stripe Dashboard versus the version the node expects.
client_must_provide: Preferred currency and default tax behavior settings
research_notes: Stripe is the primary provider for this category in n8n. While PayPal and Square have native nodes, Stripe's integration is the most mature and frequently used in workflow automation.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Stripe is the primary provider for this category in n8n. While PayPal and Square have native nodes, Stripe's integration is the most mature and frequently used in workflow automation.
